steps.title: Identify like terms
steps.content: Both terms contain $x^3$, so they are like terms and can be combined directly.

steps.title: Combine coefficients
steps.content:
Since the terms are like, subtract the coefficients while keeping $x^3$ unchanged:

$$12x^3 - 5x^3 = (12-5)x^3 = 7x^3$$

That matches choice C — C is correct.
